scripts.deploy:dev: npm run build:dev && npm run build:functions && firebase use tradeflow-dev && firebase deploy --only hosting,firestore:rules,storage,functions
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build:prod && npm run build:functions && firebase use tradeflow-prod && firebase deploy --only hosting,firestore:rules,storage,functions
scripts.deploy:functions: npm run build:functions && firebase deploy --only functions
scripts.build:functions: cd functions && npm install && npm run build
scripts.deploy:all:dev: npm run build:dev && npm run build:functions && firebase use tradeflow-dev && firebase deploy
scripts.deploy:all:prod: npm run build:prod && npm run build:functions && firebase use tradeflow-prod && firebase deploy
scripts.predeploy:check: npm run build:functions && echo Functions build OK
